overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game. The player explores a high-tech laboratory facility featuring large cylindrical containment tanks with red-lit specimens, transitioning from a narrow corridor into a sterile control room. The atmosphere is tense and clinical with prominent neon red lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the corridor while observing the containment tanks and blood stains on the floor

entered.detail: large cylindrical glass tank with red neon lighting containing a humanoid specimen
wall-mounted screen displaying scientific data and diagrams
dark red blood stain on the white polished floor
grey metal wall with industrial paneling

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow laboratory corridor with white marble floors and red emergency lighting. A large cylindrical stasis tank dominates the right side of the frame, while blood stains on the floor suggest recent violence. Wall monitors display scientific data on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment bay with tactical cover positions

events.description: takes cover behind white equipment cabinet and peeks around the corner cautiously

agents.ego_description: taking cover behind equipment cabinet and scanning the area ahead for threats

entered.detail: tall white cabinet with warning labels used for cover
exposed industrial ventilation pipes on the ceiling
second cylindrical containment tank visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player takes cover behind a white equipment cabinet, peering around the corner into a larger chamber. The primary stasis tank moves to the left side of the frame as the player advances, revealing additional tanks in the background and industrial ceiling infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: large containment chamber with multiple stasis tanks

events.description: exits the red-lit containment room through a doorway into a sterile blue-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the open chamber toward the exit doorway while passing multiple containment tanks

entered.detail: natural rock formation visible behind glass panels on the left wall
white counter desk with computer terminals
metal doorway frame leading to the next area
transparent glass walls separating sections of the lab

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide open containment chamber featuring multiple stasis tanks arranged throughout the space. A rocky wall display is visible on the left behind glass, while a reception desk sits on the right. The player approaches a doorway at the far end that leads to a different area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sterile control corridor with monitoring equipment

events.description: slows down and looks down at a laptop computer on the floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the sterile corridor and examining equipment and a laptop on the ground

entered.detail: large white control station with multiple monitors displaying data
blue and white vending machine against the left wall
framed scientific posters and diagrams on the right wall
open laptop computer lying on the floor near the console

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sterile corridor with cool blue-white lighting and grey concrete floors. Control consoles line the right wall with a vending machine visible on the left. The player approaches a laptop computer lying open on the floor near the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a blood-stained, red-lit laboratory corridor into a sterile, cool-toned control area. It begins by gliding past wall monitors and a massive cylindrical stasis tank on white marble floors, where red emergency lighting casts a tense glow over blood stains. As the camera takes cover behind a white equipment cabinet, it peers around the corner to reveal a larger chamber filled with industrial ceiling infrastructure and additional containment tanks. The scene then expands into a wide containment chamber featuring a rocky wall display behind glass and a reception desk before the camera advances toward a distant doorway. Finally, the environment shifts abruptly from red to cool blue-white lighting as the camera enters a sterile concrete corridor lined with control consoles and a vending machine, eventually stopping before an open laptop on the floor.
